# Connect Ventures

> Connect Ventures helps Indian businesses expand internationally across 47+ countries,
> providing compliance, market entry strategy, and partner co-creation services through
> a proprietary 5C framework.

## Key pages
- [About](https://connect-ventures-frontend.vercel.app/about.html): Company background and leadership.
- [Services](https://connect-ventures-frontend.vercel.app/services.html): Full service offering.
- [5C Model](https://connect-ventures-frontend.vercel.app/5c-model.html): Our proprietary expansion framework.
- [Countries](https://connect-ventures-frontend.vercel.app/countries.html): Markets we operate in.
- [FAQ](https://connect-ventures-frontend.vercel.app/faq.html): Common questions.
- [Contact](https://connect-ventures-frontend.vercel.app/contact.html): How to reach us.
